params.StackDescription: REP Target opponent_{p:Targeted} & You may_{p:You} may & If you_If they
params.SpellDescription: Target opponent reveals all nonland cards in their hand. You may choose one of those cards. If you do, it perpetually becomes white and its mana cost perpetually becomes {5}.
